description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that uses the skyrkt/nginx-node Docker image, runs the commands `yarn` and `yarn build`, stores the `dist` directory as an artifact, runs only on the master branch, and is tagged with docker. In the deploy stage add a job named firebase-deploy that uses the longkey1/firebase Docker image, runs `firebase deploy --token "$FIREBASE_TOKEN"`, targets the production environment, runs only on the master branch, and is also tagged with docker. No services, caches, or additional variables are defined.
